reviews.comment:
Siempre impecable todo, el personal muy amable y el café es muy rico.

Everything is always impeccable, the staff is very friendly and the coffee is delicious.

reviews.comment:
Todo excelente! Salvo los baños lo habían ensuciado un poco y era una lastima recién limpios que estaban

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent! Except for the bathrooms, which had been a little dirty and it was a shame since they had just been cleaned.

reviews.comment:
Si bien es buena la atención siempre, siempre, siempre tenes que esperar a que las chicas te vengan a despachar combustible...mínimo 5 minutos...después te atienden bien pero creo que deberían mejorar esa parte

(Translated by Google)
While the service is generally good, you always have to wait for the girls to come and pump your fuel...at least 5 minutes...after that they serve you well, but I think they should improve that aspect.
